name: Italo Calvino
bio: Italo Calvino was an Italian novelist and short story writer. His best-known works include the Our Ancestors trilogy (1952–1959), the Cosmicomics collection of short stories (1965), and the novels Invisible Cities (1972) and If on a winter's night a traveler (1979).

awards.name: Commander of the Legion of Honour
Austrian State Prize for European Literature
